narrativeProgression.summary: One evidence image contains a planted anomaly meant to bait fast conclusions.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: By morning, cropped footage of your team appears online before your own upload completes.

threadUpdates.update: Morning Leak: By morning, cropped footage of your team appears online before your own upload completes.
Peripheral signal tied to Freight elevator camera still remains unresolved.
Cross-day mismatch suggests archival tampering tied to Freight elevator camera still.
No new movement on false lead this cycle.
Subtle repetition appears in unrelated communications.

evidenceDrops.title: Midnight Lockbox - Day 11 medical record
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Freight elevator camera still.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Midnight Lockbox ARG artifact Day 11. Type: medical_record. Clue focus: Freight elevator camera still. Location: Gallowglass 24-hour storage facility and storm-drain service tunnels. Phase: Escalation & Unease. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Midnight Lockbox medical_record audio cue for day 11. Clue anchor: Freight elevator camera still. Phase: Escalation & Unease. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Freight elevator camera still and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_10.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Freight elevator camera still.
You chose {{last_major_choice}} and still think this is about evidence. Check the mirror timestamp and decide who you are willing to sacrifice.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if trusted contact changed within last 3 days
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: Your channel loyalty shifted to {{trusted_contact}}. That tells me what you fear most.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
